utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. Each one is specified with appropriate details and costs: health_coverage specifies type and cost (€185/month); property_coverage specifies coverage scope and includes cost reference; travel_coverage details specific risks (adventure sports, remote locations) and references cost inclusion; additional_services lists add-ons with specific costs (€30/month component) and service details; total_budget provides full monthly and annual cost breakdown with compliance timing. All items are fully specified as required.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes multiple components: (1) physical and mental health insurance with preventive care, telemedicine, and prescription coverage, (2) business equipment coverage and liability protection for photography work, (3) adventure sports and remote travel coverage with medical evacuation, (4) an adventure travel addon and 24/7 emergency support. From the ground-truth ratings, these map to: physical health = InsurePlus Standard Plan (rating 10), mental health = CareCo Basic Plan (rating 10), property/equipment coverage = InsurePlus Standard Coverage (rating 10), travel coverage = InsurePlus Standard Plan (rating 10), and add-ons include Adventure Travel Coverage (rating 10) and Telemedicine Services (rating 10) which are explicitly mentioned. All these components together form a comprehensive package that matches the “ideal_insurance_profile.”

final_package_text:
